FROM kvikkleire_175185730654415d8841436d0d6999f2.kartleggingsomrade k
WHERE k.omrade && (
    SELECT ST_Transform(ST_SetSRID(k2.omrade, 25833), 25833)
    FROM kommuner_627ee106072240e99d2b21ec4717bf01.kommune k2
    WHERE k2.kommunenavn ILIKE '%Trondheim%'
);

final_sql:
-- STEP 1: query [kvikkleire]
SELECT s.identifier
FROM kvikkleire_175185730654415d8841436d0d6999f2.skredrisikokvikkleireklasse s
ORDER BY s.identifier::int DESC
LIMIT 1;

-- STEP BOUNDARY --

-- STEP 2: query [kommuner]
SELECT k.omrade
FROM kommuner_627ee106072240e99d2b21ec4717bf01.kommune k
WHERE k.kommunenavn ILIKE '%Trondheim%';

-- STEP BOUNDARY --

-- STEP 3: query [kvikkleire]
SELECT k.omrade
FROM kvikkleire_175185730654415d8841436d0d6999f2.kartleggingsomrade k
WHERE k.omrade && (
    SELECT ST_Transform(ST_SetSRID(k2.omrade, 25833), 25833)
    FROM kommuner_627ee106072240e99d2b21ec4717bf01.kommune k2
    WHERE k2.kommunenavn ILIKE '%Trondheim%'
);

1.sql:
SELECT s.identifier
FROM kvikkleire_175185730654415d8841436d0d6999f2.skredrisikokvikkleireklasse s
ORDER BY s.identifier::int DESC
LIMIT 1;

3.sql:
SELECT k.omrade
FROM kvikkleire_175185730654415d8841436d0d6999f2.kartleggingsomrade k
WHERE k.omrade && (
    SELECT ST_Transform(ST_SetSRID(k2.omrade, 25833), 25833)
    FROM kommuner_627ee106072240e99d2b21ec4717bf01.kommune k2
    WHERE k2.kommunenavn ILIKE '%Trondheim%'
);

1.description: retrieve highest risk class identifier for quick-clay hazard

2.description: retrieve Trondheim municipality geometry for spatial filtering

3.description: retrieve quick-clay hazard polygons filtered by high risk class and Trondheim municipality extent

4.description: retrieve buildings filtered by Trondheim municipality

5.description: identify buildings intersecting high-risk quick-clay hazard areas

7.description: calculate distance from each intersecting building to municipality centroid

8.description: collapse to one row per building with minimum distance

9.description: sort buildings by distance ascending, then by building ID ascending for tie-breaker

replan_trigger.error: Step 3 exhausted SQL repair budget (2 attempts).

JOIN kvikkleire_175185730654415d8841436d0d6999f2.skredrisikokvikkleireklasse s
